==Biography==
Dan was introduced to League of Legends through some of his real life friends. His first main was {{ci|Twisted Fate}}. He started competitive LoL by contacting people on the NA Server, and [[Guitarasaurus|Brain Cordry]] (later [[Evil Geniuses.EU|Evil Geniuses]] Manager) gave him a shot. On June 22, Dan joined [[Unicorns Of Love]]. His parents supported his pursuing playing professionally but to them school was more important than gaming, hence his being unable to participate in the [[2014_EU_Challenger_Series/Summer_Series/Playoffs|2014 EU CS Summer Playoffs]].

== Trivia ==
